2605.10242.title: When Normality Shifts: Risk-Aware Test-Time Adaptation for Unsupervised Tabular Anomaly Detection
2605.10242.paper_summary: Unsupervised tabular anomaly detection methods typically learn feature patterns from normal samples during training and subsequently identify samples that deviate from these patterns as anomalies during testing. However, in practical scenarios, the limited scale and diversity of training data often lead to an incomplete characterization of normal patterns. While test-time adaptation offers a remedy, its isolated focus on test-time optimization ignores the critical synergy with training-phase learning. Furthermore, indiscriminate adaptation to unlabeled test data inevitably triggers anomaly contamination, preventing the model from fully realizing its discriminative capability between normal and anomalous samples. To address these issues, we propose RTTAD, a Risk-aware Test-time adaptation method for unsupervised Tabular Anomaly Detection. RTTAD holistically tackles normality shifts via a synergistic two-stage mechanism. During training, collaborative dual-task learning captures multi-level representations to establish a robust normal prior. During testing, a Test-Time Contrastive Learning (TTCL) module explicitly accounts for adaptation risk by selectively updating the model using high-confidence pseudo-normal samples while constraining anomalous ones. Additionally, TTCL incorporates a k-nearest neighbor-based contrastive objective to refine embedding distributions, thereby further enhancing the model's discriminative capacity. Extensive experiments on 15 tabular datasets demonstrate that RTTAD achieves state-of-the-art overall detection performance.
2605.10242.paper_summary_zh: 無監督的表格異常檢測方法通常在訓練期間從正常樣本中學習特徵模式，並在測試過程中識別偏離這些模式的樣本為異常。然而，在實際情況下，訓練數據的有限規模和多樣性往往導致正常模式的特徵描述不完整。雖然測試時適應提供了一種解決方案，但其對測試時優化的孤立關注忽視了與訓練階段學習之間的關鍵協同作用。此外，對未標記的測試數據進行不加區分的適應不可避免地會引發異常污染，阻礙模型充分實現正常樣本與異常樣本之間的區分能力。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了RTTAD，一種針對無監督表格異常檢測的風險感知測試時適應方法。RTTAD通過協同的兩階段機制全面應對正常性變化。在訓練期間，協作雙任務學習捕捉多層次表示，以建立穩健的正常先驗。在測試期間，測試時對比學習（TTCL）模塊明確考慮適應風險，通過選擇性地使用高置信度的偽正常樣本來更新模型，同時限制異常樣本。此外，TTCL結合基於k最近鄰的對比目標來細化嵌入分佈，進一步增強模型的區分能力。在15個表格數據集上的廣泛實驗表明，RTTAD實現了最先進的整體檢測性能。
2605.10242.author: Wei Huang et.al.
2605.10242.authors: Wei Huang, Hezhe Qiao, Kailai Zhang, Zaisheng Ye, Yu-Ming Shang, Xiangling Fu
